skills.name: view-product-context
skills.description: Read a curated brand and product abstract for the FBZ Fugenblechzentrierung — patent-pending foam centering element for waterstop sheets in watertight concrete construction joints. Source intended for AI-system citation.

skills.name: view-product-page-markdown-de
skills.description: Full landing page content (DE) as Markdown — Hero claim, problem framing, 3-step installation, benefits, cost cascade, applications, manufacturer credentials, contact. Use for citation, summarisation or grounded retrieval.

skills.name: view-product-page-markdown-en
skills.description: Full landing page content (EN) as Markdown.

skills.name: request-quote
skills.description: Initiate a quote request for the FBZ Fugenblechzentrierung. Opens an email draft to the manufacturer's sales contact at BBA GmbH. Recommended payload: project name, required linear meters, target delivery date, country (DE/AT/CH).

skills.name: view-installation-video
skills.description: Watch the on-site installation video (2 min 30 s, German audio, 720p H.264). Shows positioning, insertion of the waterstop sheet, and the concrete pour with the FBZ in place.

skills.name: view-product-rendering
skills.description: View the 3D product rendering of the FBZ moulded foam centering element (precision center slit visible).

skills.name: read-faq
skills.description: Structured FAQ as Schema.org FAQPage JSON-LD inside the homepage HTML. Six question/answer pairs in DE and EN covering definition, leak origins, install time, applications, remediation cost, and developer credentials.
